summary: 已确认 33 与 xhs/neko 的第一处差异是 skill 运行文件版本/哈希。已将 33 的 live-good community_integration.mjs 基线同步到 xhs/neko 实际运行路径，但重启后新的第一处断点前移到服务启动阶段：xhs/neko 都在 /agents 注册时报 agent name already exists，导致 service 不稳定、socket 缺失、/send 退化为 502 ENOENT，因此 step0.handshake 仍未通过。
blocker: xhs/neko service startup now fails earlier at /agents with agent name already exists after baseline sync; channel readiness remains false because sockets are not created.
tests: 33 baseline file compared against xhs/neko runtime bundles
synced community_integration.mjs to xhs/neko actual ExecStart paths
